name: DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach
address: 4000 South Ocean Drive, Hallandale Beach, Hallandale Beach (FL), Hoa Kỳ
description:
DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach

DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach cung cấp nhiều cơ sở vật chất tại chỗ để làm hài lòng cả vị khách khó tính nhất. Giữ liên lạc trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của quý khách với việc được truy cập internet miễn phí. Có chỗ đỗ xe, do khách sạn cung cấp cho những khách lái xe riêng. Khách sạn cung cấp các dịch vụ quầy lễ tân như két sắt, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng để tạo sự thuận tiện cho khách.
Dễ dàng mua vé cho các hoạt động giải trí tốt nhất của thành phố qua chuyến du lịch của khách sạn. Cảm thấy không muốn làm gì? Các dịch vụ có sẵn như dọn phòng hằng ngày giúp quý khách tận dụng tối đa thời gian của mình tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach.
Khách sạn cấm hút thuốc hoàn toàn.
Trải nghiệm tiện nghi phòng chất lượng cao trong thời gian quý khách lưu trú tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach. Giải trí trong phòng như ti-vi được cung cấp cho khách trong các phòng chọn lọc. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp trà hòa tan trong một số phòng khi quý khách thấy cần. DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach cũng cung cấp máy sấy tóc trong một số phòng tắm của mình để thuận tiện cho quý khách.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Một số lựa chọn ăn uống tuyệt vời tại khách sạn đảm bảo rằng quý khách sẽ luôn có những lựa chọn thuận tiện và ngon miệng. Một đêm tuyệt vời không thể dễ dàng hơn! Tận hưởng một buổi tối vui vẻ mà không cần ra ngoài quán bar. Các cơ sở vật chất giải trí tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach được thiết kế để mang đến sự giải thoát và thư giãn. Hãy nhớ dành chút thời gian khám phá bãi biển, có thể đi thẳng tới đây từ khách sạn.
Kết thúc ngày của quý khách trong sự thư giãn hoàn toàn với một chuyến ghé quabồn tắm nước nóng, nằm ngay trong khách sạn. Bể bơi trong khuôn viên khách sạn chào mời quý khách đến ngâm mình trong làn nước mát hoặc làm vài vòng thư giãn mỗi ngày.
Những người yêu thích thể dục và muốn duy trì thói quen của mình trong kỳ nghỉ có thể ghé qua trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn. Hãy thử tài của quý khách! Tham gia tranh tài với nhóm du lịch của quý khách hoặc những khách khác tại sân gôn tại chỗ nghỉ của khách sạn. Hòa nhập xã hội phòng giải trí của khách sạn, nơi quý khách có thể gặp gỡ những vị khách khác.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Đây là một khách sạn rất đẹp, mọi thứ đều thoải mái và hồ bơi rất tuyệt, nhưng chỉ hoạt động đến 8 giờ tối, sẽ thật tốt nếu thời gian được kéo dài để tận hưởng. Chúng tôi cảm thấy thất vọng với giá đỗ xe, 42 đô la một ngày và bạn phải yêu cầu họ mang xe cho bạn mỗi lần ngay cả khi bạn chỉ quên cái gì đó trong đó. Điều đó thật không thuận tiện. Ngoài ra, chúng tôi không thấy trong mô tả của khách sạn có phí khu nghỉ dưỡng. Cuối cùng, tổng chi phí khoảng 200 đô la mỗi đêm.
sample_comments.title: Môi trường tuyệt vời
Great hotel but too expensive and no much of amenities
sample_comments.negatives: The valet is too expensive for guest per night 45 dollars, also no free WiFi in the hotel and everything was too expensive. The pillows of the bed were really uncomfortable and the mattress was very hard.

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.negatives: I put an option for free parking and included continental breakfast and was disappointed to find parking was $42 USD per day and breakfast was not included

sample_comments.text: Địa điểm tuyệt vời, nhân viên tại quầy check-in đã rất hữu ích. Tôi đã yêu cầu một cái nhìn tốt hơn vì chúng tôi đang quay mặt về phía một bức tường. Cô ấy đã chuyển chúng tôi ngay lập tức. Vấn đề là chúng tôi được chuyển lên 2 tầng nhưng vẫn quay mặt về bức tường đó...... Cô ấy đã cố gắng. Nhân viên đêm muộn vào đêm thứ hai của chúng tôi (ca 3-11) không được dễ chịu. Rất thờ ơ, không hữu ích với máy tính và máy in cho công việc. Nói chung, một kỳ nghỉ tạm ổn.
sample_comments.title: Vị trí tuyệt vời, giá cả hợp lý.
Horrible experience. Could not get the room comfortable to sleep. The air-conditioning despite us putting it at 65 never
sample_comments.negatives: The room was never cold. It stayed at 78 to 80°.

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.negatives: Overpriced food, drinks and mandatory $42/day valet park, plus daily resort fee seemed excessive.

sample_comments.text:
Khách sạn tuyệt vời, nhân viên, vị trí. 
Trải nghiệm tốt nhất từ trước đến nay!
sample_comments.title: Xuất sắc!
Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.negatives: Coffee machine in the room is very outdated, probably from the last century

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text: Đáp ứng kỳ vọng của chúng tôi.
sample_comments.title: Một đêm lưu trú
sample_comments.room_type: 1 King Hear/mob Acc Tub/vis Doorbell Alrt

sample_comments.title: Far from what Hilton meant some time ago.
sample_comments.text:
Stay from 9 until 23 of March 23, 2022
Arrival
- Room very old looking (stained carpet; mouldy bathroom; the run-down colour on the doors; toilet handle not working until manually returned back,....)
- At check in the room was under the wrong name (difficulty finding reservation because my middle initial was used as a part of the family name or similar)
- Credit card reader had some problems and we needed to try a few different cards
- Room did not have a phone (I had to use my mobile phone to call reception (however, no one was responding)
- We were warned that room cleaning starts after the fourth day of stay???? And from that point on it will be cleaned only if we set the cleaning onr day before????
First 3 days
- Any need required coming down to because we did not have the phone. I was going down for towels, for coffee, for coffee cups......
- After day 3 we got the phone.
Rest of the stay
- Chasing game continues
- Everything required calling, requesting, replacing,....
March 15
- Room cleaned for the first time
March 16
- Room entrance door not working. Wet from the beach waiting for half an hour in the freezing hallway until the person comes and repairs the door card reader.
March 17
- Hotel internet not working. Apparently, the outside problem without explanation when the internet will be back. 
March 19
- Toilet plugged and required intervention. The service was fast but the toilet was not fixed.
March 23
- Last day. The toilet plugged again and we left...never to come back!

This is what US$400 per day offers you at this place.

sample_comments.title: Horrible experience. Could not get the room comfortable to sleep. The air-conditioning despite us putting it at 65 never
sample_comments.negatives: The room was never cold. It stayed at 78 to 80°.

sample_comments.title: Too expensive for a poor service!
sample_comments.text: Definitely a really bad and expensive option if you just want to spend some days off and relax. The only good service that we got was the valet service.. Front desk was a bit of a mess, restaurant was not good -specially with specific indications and attention-, room service was pretty bad and the beach spot is a bit tiny. Won't recommend this hotel if you are travelling with family, want to relax and if you want to stay more than 2 days here.

sample_comments.title: Not happy
sample_comments.negatives: Our toilet would drain slow. We notified the desk the first night. And they responded and said we are fully booked we can move you. And maintenance isn't on at this time. So they gave us a plunger thinking it'll take care of this. Well noone came or reached out the next day. We continuously had to plunge for the toilet to flush.

sample_comments.title: Not worth the Double Tree Name or Price
sample_comments.text: The hotel is old. The room we have has the glass in the shower missing so they put up an old shower rod and curtain, tacky! The carpets need to be cleaned. The view is of an old dirty tennis court and little bit of water. Very disappointing! There's on about 20 channels on the TV. The restaurants all close at about 7:00 pm, so it's hard to get dinner here. Very poor choice for South Florida. Go across the street to HYDE!

sample_comments.title: Management was unwilling to compensate for giving my room away and making my child sleep on a roll away bed
sample_comments.negatives: Property sold my room to someone else and gave me a room I didn't reserve

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: Nothingwas like the website portraid itvto be abdcthey have no public parking so your forced to pay $30 a night for valet parking my husband and I are both handicap due to having strokes the handicap rooms were not equipped to handlebud we've had to go buy a shower chair will not bring staying there again

sample_comments.title: Poorly
sample_comments.positives: The room smelled awful and the sliding door was not working
sample_comments.negatives: The room smelled

sample_comments.title: Great Location, price appropriate
sample_comments.text: Great Location, Staff member at check in was helpful . I requested a better view because we were facing a wall. She moved us immediately. Problem is we were moved 2 floors up but facing the same wall...... She tried. The late night staff member on our 2nd night (3-11 shift) wasnt pleasant. Very nonchalant, not helpful with business computers and printers. Overall Decent stay.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: The staff the hidden prices

sample_comments.title: Hidden fees
sample_comments.text: Overall it was a nice resort. But i hate when fees are hidden at booking time. There is absolutely no chance to park the car. That means you have to pay for valet parking, each day around 40usd. Parking lot is right beside the hotel but they didnt allow self parking. And valet parking means, you have to wait too, every time you need something from your car.
sample_comments.room_type: 2 QN HR/MOB ROLL IN SHOWER-VIS DOORBELL ALRT

sample_comments.title: GROSS ..AWFEL.. and when we got there told about the $30. valet and $40. "resort fee"...
sample_comments.positives: dirty rooms.. found a small roach in suitcase when arrived home... valet parked car at 11 PM and in the morning at 10AM was brought back with the back end covered in bird poop... NEVER EVER stay here again.. or at a Double Tree.. can't believe its a Hilton
sample_comments.negatives: read the above....

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Doorman and and staffs in registration desk are nice. Complimentary snacks on the bar in you room are good, but there is very slow room cleaning service if you stay more than 2 day. Sometimes you have wait the room cleaning service to until 4 p.m. and you cannot come back to your room. If you want to buy something at Amazon, there are a Amazon locker beside the hotel.

The wirse hotel I have been in my life
Three days that they did not make our room
sample_comments.negatives: Very bad fiid and seevuce

sample_comments.negatives: They promised breakfast included I had a hard time to get it and they limit the food that I can choose ....they over charge me

sample_comments.title: Did not stay
sample_comments.positives: End up not staying due to pool being renovated and room was not satisfied. End up leaving
sample_comments.negatives: Room , pool area renovate

sample_comments.title: Great environment
sample_comments.text: This is a very nice hotel, everything is comfortable and the pool is great, but it only works until 8pm, it would be nice to extend the time to enjoy it. We were disappointed with the price of parking, $42 per day and you have to ask them to give you your car every time even if you just forgot something in it. It is inconvenient. Also, we did not see in the description of the hotel a resort fee. In the end it comes out to about $200 per night.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: False advertisement , pool was closed , no warning , when I tried to cancel they denied me and kept my money . Total ripoff . How is this even legal . Might start a lawsuit so Noone else gets taken advantage of ..
sample_comments.negatives: They STOLE my money ...Don't stay here

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Great hotel to spend time for relax

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives:
AC FROZED UP in the middle of the night. Changed rooms at like 12:30or so. By the time we got into other bedroom didn't get to sleep till 2-3am, and had to check out at 10-11. Shower head broke in second room
 So unable to take showers. This was the worst Double Tree ever and I've stayed in quite a few. Manager needs to looks at these room. So terrible. 
Kim Stone

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: The staff was super nice , friendly and helpful.

sample_comments.title: GIVE MY MONEY BACK NOW!
sample_comments.negatives: The front desk staff and managers are barely speaking English with no understanding and OVER charging with unauthorized transactions. I've been on the phone for a 5 days trying to show proof and retrieve back what they took from us! I will NEVER EVER stay here again and will never recommend anyone to stay there!

sample_comments.text: Despues de pagar $673 por mi estadia de 4 noches y 3 dias, me cobraron $297 adicionales por cargos de resort y Valet Parking. Un parking que te obligan a pagar sin tu pedirlo. Hubiera preferido un Airbnb, hubiera pagado menos por más

sample_comments.title: Never again
sample_comments.positives: Amenities are great, at least at the lobby. That's all I got to see.
sample_comments.negatives: Worst experience ever with front desk employee was frustrated, manager seem to have little to zero experience with front desk. Manager was very arrogant also with cleaning personal, he yelled at her and mistreated her. Then paid for stay when manager was trying to find a room they did not have a room available a room for a family of 4 and wanted gave us two separate rooms. Which I did not accept because I had booked a room with two beds. I was not leaving my under age kids in a separate room with no connecting door. They were at least six guests waiting for items asked at front desk and after hours of asking for what they needed they never came as per guests. Ended leaving the premise's and booking a different hotel.

sample_comments.text: Für zwei Nächte völlig okay! Der Security am Pool nimmt seine Arbeit zu ernst....

sample_comments.title: Nice location
sample_comments.text: Everything is close: the beach, the Walmart, restaurants

sample_comments.title: 位置不錯
sample_comments.text: 服務很好

sample_comments.title: Hotel Value
sample_comments.text: I recommend th Double Tree REsort by Hilton Hollywood Beach, but felt upset by the fact that they charge USD 5 per package that the Amazon delivers. This includes very small package. No exceptions.

sample_comments.title: We couldn't sleep because of the AC that wasn't fixed. Terrible stay.
sample_comments.negatives: I stayed in 824, the AC was not working properly. I informed the reception that they were going to send a technician and that never happened. The next day they said they were going to deduct 50% of the valet, which never happened. The truth is I will not go to that hotel again. They charge you a charger fee in the bar and restaurant, it is very expensive, I do not recommend it.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: Room was not clean ( visible dirt, shower head , curtains and toilet holder just fell off) and I fell in the pool area due to uneven pavement.

sample_comments.title: A lot of money for a mediocre facility
sample_comments.positives: The room and bathroom are old, dirty and dated. The woman at the front desk was rude and abrupt
sample_comments.negatives: Old

sample_comments.title: A major disappointment which did not replication the description of the hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Apart from the food being terrible, the staff were just going through the motions. The concierge made a special effort but their motivation was the tops!
sample_comments.negatives: Two hotels with exactly the same name in the same street and the reception stated that guests often arrive in the wrong hotel. A ridiculous scenario for an international hotel chain!

sample_comments.title: Never again
sample_comments.negatives: 45 min for a basic breakfast and not good

sample_comments.title: very bad experience
sample_comments.negatives: Stuff was very not nice, told me there are no rooms. when i checked booking i found many available rooms. needed to order from booking. even after ordering the stuff was still very not nice. asked to talk to a manager but he never got back to me. finally after waiting 1.5h i got a room, go up and the key wasnt working. go down and got a key to another room which opened. the room wasn't clean and (bad wasn't ready) i just gave up as it was too late and slept on the bad as is. left the hotel first thing on the morning as i wasn't able to stay at this room with this stuff audited.

sample_comments.title: OVERCHARGED
sample_comments.negatives: Valet parking was the only option. I set up this reservation online through booking.com that did not include daily resort fees and taxes. My staff member was not able to self-park adding an additional $30 per day plus tax. Total additional charges he incurred at checkout was close to an additional $300. I would have booked the HardRock which was the preferred property for the amount that I am ending up paying. The only option to park being Valet was not listed on booking.com. When I asked for a copy of these charges Doubletree stated the guest acknowledged this upon checking in, however, they will not provide a signed copy of the daily charges, valet parking and taxes that attribute to close to $300. First time booking on Booking.com and probably will not be using it again.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: I don't like that $100 per night for a security deposit and the pool was disgusting, water was filthy, did not look clean what so ever, the ice machine was terrible.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives:
Cleanliness. 
Dirty tub and bed

sample_comments.title: I will take necessary measures if I'll go again.
sample_comments.positives: I'm not complaining about the hotel, I had a good time. Room was clean, bed was pretty decent .... but
sample_comments.negatives:
There was no shampoo/soap.
The fridge didn't work.
At the pool, one of the waitress took my umbrella while I was in the water and gave it to the DJ, and it was not unattended, I had my clothes and towels and when we approached him, he took it the wrong way.
When checking out, I noticed that not only I was charged $100 the day I checked in which is understandable but another $100 were charged and the young lady at the front simply told me that the Hotel has the "HABIT" to over charge but not to worry it will be credited to my account.
Still waiting.

sample_comments.title: unorganized
sample_comments.positives: it was nice location , nice place to be but i usually stay at the diplomat or margaritville and opted for this because it was a bit cheaper , the truth is you get what you pay for the staff was incredibly rude
sample_comments.negatives: front desk was a bunch of rude people . the manager John from Boston was very kind . the rest were terrible . people were complaining that they didn't get clean towels for 6-7 hours after asking . we slept in the lobby . it was def a different experience .

sample_comments.title: The outrageous hidden charges/taxes totally ruined what could've been an awesome experience.
sample_comments.positives: The room was quite spacious. There was not much of a view as my room faced another building. However, I appreciated the morning sun and the privacy.
sample_comments.negatives: I was not informed about valet parking @ $35 per night when I reserved the hotel. I checked in after midnight on Saturday morning and checked Monday. No use of the resort but was charged resort and occupancy fees which was quite ridiculous.

sample_comments.title: Very poor quality in every aspect.
sample_comments.negatives: Price didnt match what i booked online, Outlets in the room didn't work, only 2 towels for 3 guests, burn marks on furniture and odor in the room.

sample_comments.title: Valet was very rude, breakfast was extra on the booking, only went 1 day and never went back. Had to request a baby crib
sample_comments.negatives: Staff & Forced Valet

sample_comments.title: Not worth the money I paid
sample_comments.positives: My stay over all was okay. I decided to rent here for my husbands 37th birthday with our 10 month old baby girl. We requested a crib and the one provided to us was broken and had to wait a long time till a new one arrived to our room and it was already our baby's bed time... we also had dirty towels left in our bathroom with dirt on them and no shower gel at all. The beds were very uncomfortable and also the fact that I'm 9 months and about to give birth in 2 weeks the ac in the room wasn't cooling down. The pool area was nice and decent. Our service at breakfast wasn't the best. We were greeted by a host who seemed to not be having a good morning and seemed to not care about her job nor how she greeted her customers. Our waitress seemed to be under stress as she was the only one serving the tables and their computer system was down so she had to write everything down.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: The room did not smell clean and our shower had hairs.

sample_comments.title: It was just ok. The food is not good it's almost like they put it in a microwave
sample_comments.positives: My room was very nice and clean
sample_comments.negatives: The property is not a resort at all it only has one restaurant maybe two and two bars the second bar and restaurant is only offered on certain days. There is no shops in this hotel to shop at. To call it a resort is a bit much. This hotel charges resort fees and there is nothing there that makes you feel you're at a resort.

sample_comments.title: This has not been the best motel that i have stayed in and don't think that i will be staying again.
sample_comments.positives: The pool area was very beautiful.
sample_comments.negatives: I did not like that the motel did not have good water pressure. I also did not like that when i booked my motel that there was no mention of $400.00 worth of additional fee's that I needed to pay at the motel upon arrival. The first support staff that we encountered needs to learn what customer service really is she was very rude. Then on our first night i call and let support staff that the TV was not hooked up correctly and was not working. The front desk personal said that they would get someone up to my room right away and at 11:45 PM i called back downstairs and let them know that i was done waiting for someone to come take a look. I had already waited almost 2 hours for a maintenance person. Then next day my husband ended up fixing it.

sample_comments.title: Have extra money on hand. Over 300

sample_comments.title: Great hotel but too expensive and no much of amenities
sample_comments.negatives: The valet is too expensive for guest per night 45 dollars, also no free WiFi in the hotel and everything was too expensive. The pillows of the bed were really uncomfortable and the mattress was very hard.

sample_comments.title: It was sufficient
sample_comments.negatives: My husband asked for a balcony from when we first looked at them when we got there they gave us a room that faced a wall. It was awful.

Check in time was supposed to be 4 pm.
Room finally available about 6:15 pm.

Check card did not work. Had to go downstairs twice and maintenance personnel had to reboot lock.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable

sample_comments.title: Acceptable

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: Toilet did not work upon arrival and phone in room was broken.

sample_comments.title: Condering mandatory additionals to room rate, it's not worth it
sample_comments.negatives: Terrible staff, rude and not caring about solving basic issues. They charge for receiving/handling packages sent from customers and usially boxes "get lost" , so they most likely keep clients'stuff. They charge $40 daily for "resort" which is the pool, use it or not.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives:
Perhaps it was overlooked on my end... but the whole valet service is an insult...
Aside from one individual who was professional in every way... the staff was rude and power/ authority hungry... and the fact that one pays 40 on top of their room considering the hotel has nothing to do with the valet service as far as I understand... it's simply absurd
sample_comments.negatives: Stated above

sample_comments.title: Never ever again
sample_comments.negatives: Called and asked for a room with a view- some view, the rubbish cans in the alley. So close to the next building which was all the exhausts for their air conditioners- the noise was horrible. Being a Hilton Honors member , very very disappointed.

sample_comments.title: I got ripped off.
sample_comments.negatives: For $600 a night, I refuse to let anyone violate my rights by going through my bags. It is unheard of and extremely ghetto! Had I known I would be refused access to the pool unless the staff went through my bag, I would have stayed at another hotel. Nowhere on the hotel's website does it say there would be someone going through my bags in order to use the pool. Seriously, that's just ghetto. Don't get me started on the fact that the staff was not helpful when my card was double charged. We spent over 1k for 2 nights, and they still want to go through my things. I would NEVER stay there again. Clearly, the hotel has safety issues if they want to go through my bag.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.negatives: Coffee machine in the room is very outdated, probably from the last century

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.positives: Room was fine. We only stayed one night until the unit we had rented for the week was available.
sample_comments.negatives: We did not use the beach or pool and would have refused the service fee if we could have.

sample_comments.title: The staff was very nice and helpful. Checkin was quick. Close to shops and Hollywood beach and easy.
sample_comments.positives: I liked the proximity of the beach and accessible pool. Very close to shops
sample_comments.negatives: Valet parking should be optional. I should be able to walk 10 steps and get my car without having to bother anyone. Let alone pay $43 a day. It should be mentioned on the website!

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: The room was spacious, clean and comfortable. Parking was only by valet, but they were courteous and responsive. Great location if you're looking for beach access. Pool and beach amenities were very good.
sample_comments.negatives: The service in the restaurant/bar was good at breakfast but less so in the afternoon and evening. The food was good but not very good.

sample_comments.title: Not the best choice if you want to go to the broadwalk everyday.
sample_comments.positives: The property was nice and pool area beautiful.
sample_comments.negatives: Very expensive for valet parking.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel in great location
sample_comments.positives: One quick night there on the way to a conference. Great spot in good location with a great pool, dining area etc. I wish i had have know that a water taxi could have taken me down the canal to the next place i was going to. Id recommend researching that option as a form of transport, but also as a way of seeing Fort Lauderdale from the water

secondary.description_full:
DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach

DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach cung cấp nhiều cơ sở vật chất tại chỗ để làm hài lòng cả vị khách khó tính nhất. Giữ liên lạc trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của quý khách với việc được truy cập internet miễn phí. Có chỗ đỗ xe, do khách sạn cung cấp cho những khách lái xe riêng. Khách sạn cung cấp các dịch vụ quầy lễ tân như két sắt, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng để tạo sự thuận tiện cho khách.
Dễ dàng mua vé cho các hoạt động giải trí tốt nhất của thành phố qua chuyến du lịch của khách sạn. Cảm thấy không muốn làm gì? Các dịch vụ có sẵn như dọn phòng hằng ngày giúp quý khách tận dụng tối đa thời gian của mình tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach.
Khách sạn cấm hút thuốc hoàn toàn.
Trải nghiệm tiện nghi phòng chất lượng cao trong thời gian quý khách lưu trú tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach. Giải trí trong phòng như ti-vi được cung cấp cho khách trong các phòng chọn lọc. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp trà hòa tan trong một số phòng khi quý khách thấy cần. DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach cũng cung cấp máy sấy tóc trong một số phòng tắm của mình để thuận tiện cho quý khách.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Một số lựa chọn ăn uống tuyệt vời tại khách sạn đảm bảo rằng quý khách sẽ luôn có những lựa chọn thuận tiện và ngon miệng. Một đêm tuyệt vời không thể dễ dàng hơn! Tận hưởng một buổi tối vui vẻ mà không cần ra ngoài quán bar. Các cơ sở vật chất giải trí tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach được thiết kế để mang đến sự giải thoát và thư giãn. Hãy nhớ dành chút thời gian khám phá bãi biển, có thể đi thẳng tới đây từ khách sạn.
Kết thúc ngày của quý khách trong sự thư giãn hoàn toàn với một chuyến ghé quabồn tắm nước nóng, nằm ngay trong khách sạn. Bể bơi trong khuôn viên khách sạn chào mời quý khách đến ngâm mình trong làn nước mát hoặc làm vài vòng thư giãn mỗi ngày.
Những người yêu thích thể dục và muốn duy trì thói quen của mình trong kỳ nghỉ có thể ghé qua trung tâm thể dục của khách sạn. Hãy thử tài của quý khách! Tham gia tranh tài với nhóm du lịch của quý khách hoặc những khách khác tại sân gôn tại chỗ nghỉ của khách sạn. Hòa nhập xã hội phòng giải trí của khách sạn, nơi quý khách có thể gặp gỡ những vị khách khác.

childPolicies.policy: Trẻ sơ sinh 0-0 tuổi [bao gồm cả bé 0 tuổi]
childPolicies.description: Lưu trú miễn phí khi sử dụng giường có sẵn. Lưu ý, nếu quý khách cần cũi em bé, việc này có thể phát sinh thêm phụ phí và phụ thuộc vào tình trạng thực tế.

childPolicies.policy: Trẻ em 1-17 tuổi [bao gồm cả bé 17 tuổi]
childPolicies.description: Ở miễn phí nếu sử dụng giường có sẵn.

extrabedPolicies.description: Giường phụ tùy thuộc vào loại phòng bạn chọn, xin vui lòng kiểm tra thông tin phòng để biết thêm chi tiết.

policyNotes: Giữ tiền đặt cọc chi phí phát sinh: 125 USD mỗi đêm.

dateless_rooms.name: 1 King Hear/mob Acc Tub/vis Doorbell Alrt (1 KING HEAR/MOB ACC TUB/VIS DOORBELL ALRT)
2 Qn Hr/mob Roll In Shower-vis Doorbell Alrt (2 QN HR/MOB ROLL IN SHOWER-VIS DOORBELL ALRT)
Suite Có Giường Cỡ King (King Suite)

description_short: Hãy thực hiện hành trình tuyệt vời nhất của quý khách tới Hallandale Beach (FL) với tiêu chuẩn Hilton CleanStay đã cam kết và tận hưởng Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Hallandale Beach của Hallandale Beach (FL), chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 4 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng bể bơi ngoài trời, bồn tắm nước nóng và phòng tập ngay trong khuôn viên.

faq.question: DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach có bể bơi không?
faq.answer: Trong thời gian lưu trú tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach, quý khách có thể bắt đầu ngày mới bằng cách nhảy ùm xuống làn nước mát của bể bơi tại cơ sở lưu trú hoặc chỉ đơn giản là nằm thư giãn bên bể bơi sau một ngày dài khám phá.

faq.question: DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach có ATM trong khuôn viên không?
faq.answer: Có! Lợi ích của việc lưu trú tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach bao gồm máy ATM trong khuôn viên, giúp quý khách dễ dàng rút tiền mặt và có một kỳ lưu trú không lo lắng.

faq.question: Chính sách về giường ngủ cho trẻ em tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach
faq.answer: Chính sách Giường ngủ cho trẻ em tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach tính trẻ 18 tuổi trở lên là người lớn và phải sử dụng giường phụ (có phụ phí). Quý khách có thể tìm thêm thông tin về Chính sách cụ thể cho Trẻ em và Độ tuổi của cơ sở lưu trú này tại phần Chính sách Cơ sở lưu trú nằm tại trang thông tin cơ sở lưu trú để biết thêm chi tiết.

faq.question: Tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach, khách thường lưu trú trong bao lâu?
faq.answer: Khách trước đây đã được xác thực lưu trú tạiDoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach có thời gian lưu trú trung bình mỗi đêm là 2 đêm tại cơ sở lưu trú này.

faq.question: Mùa cao điểm trong năm tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach
faq.answer: July là mùa cao điểm trong năm tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach. Đây là khoảng thời gian du khách đã xác thực lưu trú nhiều nhất tại đây.

faq.question: Điểm trung bình từ khách doanh nhân dành cho DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach
faq.answer: 7.2 là điểm số trung bình của khách doanh nhân trước đây đã nghỉ tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach đánh giá cơ sở lưu trú này. Quý khách có thể xem các đánh giá chi tiết hơn của khách hàng và nhận xét bằng cách lọc theo đối tượng khách đã được xác thực ở phần đánh giá.

faq.question: Điểm trung bình từ khách cặp đôi dành cho DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach
faq.answer: 7.9 là điểm số trung bình của khách cặp đôi trước đây đã nghỉ tại DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach đánh giá cơ sở lưu trú này. Quý khách có thể xem các đánh giá chi tiết hơn của khách hàng và nhận xét bằng cách lọc theo đối tượng khách đã được xác thực ở phần đánh giá.

faq.question: Bến tàu, trạm tàu điện ngầm hoặc bến xe buýt nào gần DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach nhất?
faq.answer: Bến tàu, trạm tàu điện ngầm hoặc bến xe buýt gần nhất là Aventura Train Station, cách DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach 4226.94 m.

faq.question: Giờ nhận phòng và trả phòng ở DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach
faq.answer: Nhận phòng từ 04:00 PM và trả phòng cho đến 11:00 AM. Quý khách có thể yêu cầu nhận phòng sớm hoặc trả phòng muộn trong lúc đặt phòng, phụ thuộc vào tình trạng phòng trống. Khách nhận phòng hoặc trả phòng trước hoặc sau khoảng thời gian chỉ định có thể phải thanh toán một khoản phụ phí.

faq.question: Sân bay gần DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach nhất
faq.answer: Sân bay gần DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach nhất là Sân bay Quốc tế Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood, cách 10.0 km.

suitable_for: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên
tags: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên
Nhận/trả phòng được đánh giá cao
Thích hợp cho các hoạt động
Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng!
miễn phí đưa đón sân bay
embedding_text:
DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hollywood Beach - khách sạn 4.0 sao tại Hallandale Beach (FL).
Địa chỉ: 4000 South Ocean Drive, Hallandale Beach, Hallandale Beach (FL), Hoa Kỳ.
Hãy thực hiện hành trình tuyệt vời nhất của quý khách tới Hallandale Beach (FL) với tiêu chuẩn Hilton CleanStay đã cam kết và tận hưởng Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Hallandale Beach của Hallandale Beach (FL), chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 4 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng bể bơi ngoài trời, bồn tắm nước nóng và phòng tập ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Bàn làm việc, Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi chơi bowling, Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bãi đỗ xe có nhân viên, Bình chữa cháy, Bơi với ống thở, Bơi xuồng, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi, Bể bơi có tầm nhìn, Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bồn tắm nước nóng, Bữa sáng đầy đủ kiểu Mỹ, Bữa ăn cho trẻ, Chuyến du lịch, Các loại khăn, Các phương tiện dành cho khách khuyết tật, Câu cá, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Cơ sở vật chất cho họp mặt/tiệc lớn, Cửa hàng tạp hóa, Cửa sổ, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ báo thức, Dịch vụ trông giữ thú cưng, Dịch vụ ủi đồ, Dọn phòng hằng ngày, Giường cũi của em bé (theo yêu cầu), Giải trí trong khuôn viên.
Điểm đánh giá 8.1/10 dựa trên 82 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Đáng tiền, Nhận phòng, Địa điểm, Bãi đỗ xe, Dịch vụ, Bể bơi, Không khí.
Các loại phòng: 1 King Bed (1 King Bed); 2 Queen Beds - Treat Yourself Amenities; 2 Queen Beds (2 Queen Beds); 1 King 2 Room Suite; 2 Qn Hr/mob Roll In Shower-vis Doorbell Alrt (2 QN HR/MOB ROLL IN SHOWER-VIS DOORBELL ALRT); 1 KING CORNER (1 King Corner); 1 King Hear/mob Acc Tub/vis Doorbell Alrt (1 KING HEAR/MOB ACC TUB/VIS DOORBELL ALRT); 1 KING ROOM - TREAT YOURSELF AMENITIES.
Gần: Jefferson Park, Joseph Wesley Young House, Hammerstein House, Cuenca Cigars, Hollywood Beach Golf Resort, Charnow Park.
